name: abap-mcp
description: Agentic SAP ABAP development via ADT REST API — 67 MCP tools for search/read/write, CDS/RAP/OData, Clean ABAP review, DDIC pre-write validation, transports, abapGit, BTP/SAProuter connectivity, and impact analysis.

sap_url.title: SAP System URL
sap_url.description: Base URL of your SAP system's ADT endpoint, e.g. https://mysystem.example.com:44300

sap_user.title: SAP User
sap_user.description: SAP username used for the ADT connection

sap_password.title: SAP Password
sap_password.description: SAP password used for the ADT connection. Stored securely (OS keychain), never written to settings.json.

sap_language.title: SAP Logon Language
sap_language.description: Logon language code, e.g. EN or DE

allow_write.title: Allow write operations
allow_write.description: Enables write_abap_source and other mutating tools. Leave disabled for safe read-only use on any system.

allow_delete.title: Allow delete operations
allow_delete.description: Enables delete_abap_object. Only takes effect when write is also allowed.

allow_execute.title: Allow ad-hoc snippet execution
allow_execute.description: Enables execute_abap_snippet (ephemeral $TMP execution, auto-cleanup). Only takes effect when write is also allowed.
